global_rules.background: DO NOT use pure white backgrounds. Use a soft tinted gradient like `bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 via-indigo-50 to-emerald-50` for the main app background.
global_rules.surfaces: Cards and content areas should use glassmorphism (`bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl`) or tinted solid backgrounds (`bg-blue-50/80`) to let the colorful background shine through.
global_rules.interactions: Heavy use of micro-interactions: hover lifts (`hover:-translate-y-1`), vibrant glowing shadows (`hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.12)]`), and bouncy tap scales.
global_rules.typography: Use playful but highly legible sans-serif. Headings: Outfit (tracking-tight), Body: Manrope.

primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, main brand accent

accent_warm.usage: Alerts, upcoming match highlights, pending payments

sidebar.usage: Sidebar background. Use vibrant colored text/borders for active items.

buttons.primary: px-6 py-3 bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-cyan-500/30 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg
buttons.secondary: px-6 py-3 bg-white/80 hover:bg-white text-slate-800 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg

cards.summary_stat: rounded-3xl p-6 text-white shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden
cards.data_container: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/60 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-3xl p-6 transition-all

badges.active: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 border border-emerald-300 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider
badges.pending: bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 border border-orange-300 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider
badges.injured: bg-rose-100 text-rose-800 border border-rose-300 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider

tables.container: overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/50 bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-md shadow-sm

forms.input: bg-white/80 border-slate-200 focus:border-cyan-400 focus:ring-cyan-400/20 rounded-xl transition-all py-3 px-4
forms.tabs: flex space-x-2 bg-indigo-50/50 p-1.5 rounded-2xl w-fit

motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in and slide-up (using Framer Motion `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}`)
motion.counters: Use animated number counters for dashboard stats to make it feel alive
motion.hover_effects: Cards and rows MUST gently lift or light up to feel highly interactive

image_urls.description: Youth football practice, perfect for a vibrant login screen overlay
Young boy training, useful for empty states in the Players or Trainings modules

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
File format constraint: You are generating .js files (with React + Tailwind), NOT .tsx.
Do NOT use pure white (bg-white) for the main app background. Implement the defined soft gradient to make it colorful.
Apply the `module_colors` to the respective dashboard summary cards (e.g., the Players card should use the blue-to-indigo gradient).
Use Framer Motion or Tailwind transitions to make buttons and cards feel bouncy and alive (scale on click, lift on hover).
Keep Shadcn components but heavily override their default styling to match these vibrant, rounded-xl, glassy guidelines. Do not let it look like a default corporate Vercel dashboard.
Include a prominent language toggle (ES/EU) that fits the sporty aesthetic.
